Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants a process tree representation of a complex hospital patient management scenario using specific operators and activity labels The output should be a single process tree expression

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Operators Notation Sequence Exclusive choice Parallel True concurrency Loop Leaves Activities or silent steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 1 Arrival A Registration RG Intake Assessment IA Structure

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 2 After IA mandatory sequence Triage Interview TI Triage Classification TC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 3 Exclusive choice after TC Comprehensive ECG CE OR Full Blood Panel FBP

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Loop body Specialist Consultation SC After SC Exclusive choice Targeted Medication TM OR Specialized Physical Therapy SPT After treatment Re Diagnostic Test RDT which is an exclusive choice Follow up ECG FCE OR Follow up Blood Analysis FBA

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: after the re diagnostic test if the results are still abnormal the patient returns to the Specialist Consultation This implies the loop back is implicit or just tau

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So loop equals body with SC then treatment choice then RDT and follow up test choice with tau as second argument

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 5 After loop ends normal results concurrent activities Advanced Imaging AI and Nutritional Counseling NC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 6 After step 5 sequence Follow up Appointment Scheduling FAS Detailed Discharge Instructions DDI

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 7 After step 6 concurrent block Billing BL Insurance Claims Processing ICP Medical Records Finalization MRF

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: For three activities operator is binary so nest BL with ICP and MRF

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait I need to integrate Steps 1 and 2 properly at the beginning Lets assemble the full tree from start to finish

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets verify against the prompts description All chained sequentially Matches

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: One detail The prompt lists RDT in the expected activities set I should probably include it as an activity Lets adjust

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Revised loop body includes SC then treatment choice then RDT then choice between FCE and FBA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets double check the loop definition in PM4Py In PM4Py loop means do A then optionally do B and repeat A So B as tau is correct

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final check of the tree structure This looks solid
